GenAiPlugin.description: Automate updates to insurance policies for newly replaced vehicles.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the customer provides new vehicle details, update the insurance policy accordingly.
Ensure all required fields are provided before initiating the update.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only automate and process updates to insurance policies for vehicles being replaced. You are not able to create new policies or handle unrelated policy changes.
